test_criteria: Next incident investigation: did I use the knowledge_docs field to find the right doc, or did I grep? If grep, prediction falsified — links aren't helpful.

prediction: The 50 feedback rules are enough behavioral coverage — won't need to add more than 5-10 new rules per year
test_criteria: Count rules added in sessions #50-#60. If >20 new rules, prediction falsified — indicates behavioral gaps still being discovered.

prediction: The sap_incident_analyst skill + 7-step incident workflow lets a fresh agent take an email-format incident and produce a brain-grade root-cause document with the same depth as INC-000006073 — without the user re-explaining the methodology each time.
test_criteria: User passes the next incident as .eml. Agent invokes the skill, follows the 7 steps unprompted, produces incident_analysis_<id>.md with: header table, executive summary, code-traced root cause, evidence (Gold DB queries), fix path (immediate/structural/preventive), and brain annotations queued for ingestion. If the user has to re-explain any step or correct the structure, prediction falsified.
